title: saxifraga subspathulata var. subspathulata
intro: Saxifraga subspathulata var. subspathulata, also known as a type of Saxifrage, is a flowering plant species in the Saxifragaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating coughs, and is also used to treat digestive issues. Saxifraga subspathulata var. subspathulata can be prepared in herbal tea or decoction form, and in some regions, it is also used in traditional remedies and supplements.
